diff_snippet:
@@ -58,67 +58,151 @@ definitions:
         artifacts:
           - .revue/metrics.jsonl
 
+    - step: &build-macos
+        name: "Build macOS ARM64"
+        runs-on:
+          - self.hosted
+          - macos
+        script:
+          - export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"
+          - python3.12 -m venv .build-venv
+          - .build-venv/bin/pip install nuitka ordered-set zstandard
+          - .build-venv/bin/pip install -e src/
+          - .build-venv/bin/python -u build/build_nuitka.py
+          - .build-venv/bin/python -u build/build_wheel.py
+        artifacts:
+          - dist/wheels/*.whl
+
+    - step: &build-linux
+        name: "Build Linux x86_64"
+        image: python:3.12-slim
+        caches:
+          - pip
+        script:
+          - apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends gcc patchelf libc6-dev
+          - pip install nuitka ordered-set zstandard
+          - pip install -e src/
+          - python -u build/build_nuitka.py
+          - python -u build/build_wheel.py
+        artifacts:
+          - dist/wheels/*.whl
+
+    - step: &publish-pypi
+        name: "Publish CLI → PyPI"
+        script:
+          - pip install --quiet twine
+          - |
+            if ls dist/wheels/*.whl 2>/dev/null; then
+              export TWINE_USERNAME=__token__
+              export TWINE_PASSWORD=$PYPI_API_TOKEN
+              python -m twine upload --non-interactive --skip-existing dist/wheels/*.whl
+            else
+              echo "No wheels found — skipping PyPI upload"
+            fi
+
 pipelines:
   branches:
     main:
       - step: *run-tests
-      - parallel:
-          steps:
-            - step:
-                name: "Build Linux x86_64"
-                image: python:3.12-slim
-                caches:
-                  - pip
-                script:
-                  - apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends gcc patchelf libc6-dev
-                  - pip install nuitka ordered-set zstandard
-                  - pip install -e src/
-                  - python build/build_nuitka.py
-                  - python build/build_wheel.py
-                artifacts:
-                  - dist/wheels/*.whl
-            - step:
-                name: "Build Linux ARM64"
-                image: python:3.12-slim
-                runs-on:
-                  - self.hosted
-                  - linux.arm64
-                caches:
-                  - pip
-                script:
-                  - apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends gcc patchelf libc6-dev
-                  - pip install nuitka ordered-set zstandard
-                  - pip install -e src/
-                  - python build/build_nuitka.py
-                  - python build/build_wheel.py
-                artifacts:
-                  - dist/wheels/*.whl
-                fail-fast: false
-            - step:
-                name: "Build macOS ARM64"
-                runs-on:
-                  - self.hosted
-                  - macos.arm64
-                caches:
-                  - pip
-                script:
-                  - pip install nuitka ordered-set zstandard
-                  - pip install -e src/
-                  - python build/build_nuitka.py
-                  - python build/build_wheel.py
-                artifacts:
-                  - dist/wheels/*.whl
-                fail-fast: false
+      - step:
+          name: "Tag Release (if warranted)"
+          script:
+            - apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git
+            - |
+              BUMP=$(python3 build/determine_release.py "$(git log -1 --format='%s' HEAD)")
+              echo "Commit type → bump: $BUMP"
+              if [ "$BUMP" = "none" ]; then
+                echo "No release for this commit type — skipping tag"
+                exit 0
+              fi
+              if [ -z "${BITBUCKET_API_TOKEN:-}" ]; then
+                echo "Error: BITBUCKET_API_TOKEN not set — cannot push tag" >&2
+                exit 1
+              fi
+              case "$BUMP" in
+                major|minor|patch) ;;
+                *) echo "Error: unexpected bump value: $BUMP" >&2; exit 1 ;;
+              esac
+              # Derive version from latest git tag, not pyproject.toml — so we never
comment_body_excerpt:
**🟡 [MEDIUM] The Fly.io deploy step uses `FLY_API_TOKEN` without any validation or rate limiting. If the token is leaked, an attacker can deploy arbitrary code to the production Fly.io app.**
*Zara · Security*

> 💡 **Recommendation:** Rotate the `FLY_API_TOKEN` monthly. Use Fly.io's audit logs to de
